title: Three routine ideas
hookTemplate: 3 routines you can turn into a personalized storybook
captionTemplate: Personalized children's books are not only gifts. They can help your child rehearse everyday routines through story. {cta}

slides.headline: 3 routines that work beautifully as stories
slides.body: Because children often understand practice better when they can picture it.
slides.scene: three storybook covers on a table

slides.headline: 1. Bedtime
slides.body: A hero journey from pajamas to lights low.

slides.headline: 2. Potty practice
slides.body: A calm quest about noticing, trying, and celebrating effort.

slides.headline: 3. Toothbrushing
slides.body: A sparkle mission with simple steps.
